title: nabalus racemosus
intro: Nabalus racemosus, also known as the Eastern American Ironweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly due to its high iron content, which makes it an excellent remedy for treating anemia and other iron-deficiency related disorders. The health benefits of Nabalus racemosus include its ability to stimulate the production of red blood cells, improve oxygen delivery to tissues, and boost energy levels. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
